sendPrompt('How does the answer synthesizer work in LexRAG?')
sendPrompt('Explain CRAG pattern in detail with edge cases')

sendPrompt('Explain RAG-Fusion pattern in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain Adaptive RAG SQL plus vector routing in detail')
sendPrompt('How does Qdrant HNSW vector search work in LexRAG?')
sendPrompt('How does SQLite metadata work in Adaptive RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does Tavily web search fallback work in CRAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the PDF loader work in LexRAG ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How does the chunker work in LexRAG? What is chunk size and overlap?')
